content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于12月4日21:00(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年12月18日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、综合
● 「助战」中「筛选唤醒体」界面的唤醒体排序规则已调整为与「唤醒体」界面中一致。
 
二、问题修复
● 修复了部分情况下敌人「死亡抵抗」未正确触发的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」中召唤、分裂等在战斗中途出现的敌人其特性（如亡灵、野兽等）没有正确生效的问题。
● 修复了「常用助战」某些情况下会显示错误命轮的问题。
● 修复了「调查行动-忘却篇」6-14 和 7-13 剧情播放异常的问题。
● 修复了「战斗记录」中部分相位对弈回放播放时卡死的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」排行奖励中排名范围错误地按赛季排行参与人数的比例显示预览的问题，修复后将按本周排行参与人数比例显示。  
● 修复了「相位对弈」赛季排行中守密人自己的对弈头衔可能与排行榜显示不一致的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中某些情况下「对弈纪录」任务显示异常以及「一键领取」失败的问题。
● 修复了「手册」未解锁时，「典藏馆」部分收集任务状态显示异常的问题。
● 修复了活动「再战原初」中子关卡界面文本显示不清晰的问题。
● 修复了活动「再战原初」中「荣勋名录」中界面列表不对齐的问题。
● 修复了活动「再战原初」中唤醒体技能「等级补偿」未在队伍中使用蓝色文本标识的问题。
● 修复了活动「神诞的祭礼」中「亵祷狂欢」在储存达到上限时出现错误标点符号的问题。
● 修复了「调查行动」中，「关卡详情」的「隐藏」按钮信息在部分语言设置下显示不完整的问题。
● 修复了「调查行动」中，调查结算时唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」立绘显示不完全问题。
● 修复了使用 PC 游玩时，在「相位对弈」匹配中时敲击空格键会错误弹出「客户端传入数据错误」提示的问题。
 
三、本地化
【英语】
● 「相位对弈」模式中新增造物「锡兰红茶」、「红宝石胸针」、「遗落的祭祀刀」、「魔术手套」、「噩梦表象」、「快乐唱片」的效果描述已完成人工翻译。
● 「调查行动-忘却篇」第四章、第三章结束后与赫伯特的通讯器对话、及「调查行动-星辰篇」第二章中部分翻译措辞调整得更自然。
● 「唤醒体」升格界面、「相位对弈」关闭对手互动选项、「助战」唤醒体选择的界面文本翻译有所更新，使其更清晰易读。
● 修复了钥令「残忍的致意」效果翻译措辞错误的问题：实际效果应为获取临时力量。本修正不影响钥令实际效果。
● 修复了唤醒体「法洛思」的指令卡「防御」狂气数值未能正确显示的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「杜勒赛因」信息界面的「人格深化」按钮翻译措辞不一致的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」意识深潜故事中的一处文字格式不正确的问题。
● 修复了部分唤醒体养成素材、敌人故事描述中「深海界域」被错误翻译为「Deep Sea Realm」的问题。
● 修复了部分造物、技能、共鸣效果描述中数值未能正确显示、翻译措辞不一致的问题。

**V2.4.0.10 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on December 4 at 21:00(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on December 186, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
I. Comprehensive
● The sorting rules for the Awakener on the "Filter Awakener" interface in "Assistance" have been adjusted to be consistent with those in the "Awakener" interface.
 
II. Problem Fix
● Fixed the issue where the enemy's "Death Resistance" did not trigger correctly in certain situations.
● Fixed the issue where the characteristics of enemies summoned or split during the "Battle" (such as Departed, Beast, etc.) did not function correctly.
● Fixed the issue where "Favorite Support" would display the wrong Wheel of Destiny under certain circumstances.
● Fixed the issue of abnormal story playback in "Investigation - Faded Legacy" Chapters 6-14 and 7-13.
● Fixed the issue where some Traphase replays would freeze during playback in the "Battle Records."
● Fixed the issue where the ranking range in the "Traphase" ranking rewards was incorrectly displayed based on the ratio of the number of participants in the seasonal rankings; after the fix, it will be displayed based on the ratio of participants in this week's rankings
● Fixed the issue where the Keeper's own contest title may not match the ranking display in the "Traphase" season leaderboard.
● Fixed the issue where the "Battle Record" task displayed abnormally and the "Claim All" feature failed in some cases in "Traphase."
● Fixed the issue where the collection task status in the "Premium Hall" displayed abnormally when the "Manual" was not unlocked.
● Fixed the issue where the sub-stage interface text in the event "Against the Doom: II" was not displayed clearly.
● Fixed the issue with the misalignment of the interface list in the "Against the Doom: II" event's "Honor Roll".
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener Skill "Level Compensation" was not displayed with blue text when used in the team during the event "Against the Doom: II."
● Fixed the issue where incorrect punctuation appeared when the storage limit was reached in the event "Rites of Divine Birth" during "Profane Carnival".
● Fixed the issue where the information for the "Hide" button in the "Stage Details" of "Investigation" was not fully displayed under certain language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the character art of the Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn" was not fully displayed during the investigation settlement in "Investigation."
● Fixed the issue where pressing the space bar during matchmaking in "Traphase" while playing on PC would incorrectly trigger the "Client data input error" prompt.

3. Localization
[English]
● Corrected the translation for the Posse "Cruel Homage" to accurately reflect its effect of granting Temporary STR.
● Fixed the display of the Aliemus value on Awakener Faros's Defense card.
● Standardized the translation of the "Psyche Surge" UI button for Awakener Doresain.
● Corrected the translation of "Aequor Realm" from "Deep Sea Realm" in certain Awakener cultivation item and monster story descriptions.
● Fixed number display issues in some Relic, Skill, and Resonance effect descriptions and resolved wording inconsistencies.
● Human translated the effect descriptions for new "Traphase" mode Relics: Ceylon Tea, Crimson Brooch, Ritual Dagger, Arcane Gloves, Nightmare Manifest, and Joyous Record.
● Fixed a text format code issue in Awakener Pickman's Psyche Deepdive story.
● Improved unnatural translation wording in three story segments: Communicator dialogue with Herbert after Chapter 3 of "Investigation - Faded Legacy"; Chapter 4 of "Investigation - Faded Legacy"; Chapter 2 of "Investigation - Astral Reign"
● Updated UI text for better clarity and readability in the following areas: Awakener Edify interface; Support Awakener selection interface; Disable Opponent Emote function in Traphase
